test.command: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml or package.json; mission docs state there is no test runner in this repo.

typecheck.notes: The command reports only the documented baseline error in .next/types/validator.ts about missing ../../app/signup/complete/page.js. No api-keys files appear in the output, so the milestone is clean relative to the known baseline.

lint.notes: Full lint reports only the 17 documented baseline react/no-children-prop violations in existing auth form components. Supporting scoped check passed: bunx eslint server/procedures/apiKey.ts server/router.ts server/api-context.ts components/settings-dialog.tsx.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align validator guidance with mission-specific baseline handling: when AGENTS.md documents known pre-existing typecheck/lint failures, workers should report full-command output plus file-scoped follow-up checks instead of being forced into an all-green requirement that cannot pass.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The api-key-schema-and-procedures review noted that api-worker SKILL.md requires typecheck/lint to pass cleanly, while mission AGENTS.md documents an expected baseline typecheck failure and scoped-lint workflow. This scrutiny run reproduced the same baseline-only failures with bun run typecheck and bun run lint.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Split verification guidance for ORPC-only or middleware-only features from HTTP route features so workers are not required to perform curl checks before a reachable API surface exists.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both the api-key-schema-and-procedures and api-key-auth-middleware reviews observed that api-worker guidance assumes a REST endpoint exists for manual curl validation, but these two features intentionally shipped supporting internals before the public route handler feature.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an explicit fallback/reporting path when agent-browser verification is blocked by a known pre-existing auth failure or other unavailable prerequisite. Workers should record the deviation clearly rather than improvising procedure compliance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The api-key-settings-ui review found that browser verification was reasonably replaced with code review plus scoped validation because all /api/auth/* endpoints were already returning HTTP 500. The current ui-worker guidance does not explain how to handle that situation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Correct the known pre-existing typecheck note to say the current missing-page failure exits with code 1 rather than 2.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The api-key-settings-ui review and this scrutiny run both observed bun run typecheck exiting 1 for the documented .next/types/validator.ts TS2307 error, while mission AGENTS.md currently tells workers to expect exit code 2.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document a canonical shared API-key hashing helper because key generation and auth currently use different SHA-256 implementations.
